name: controlflow-codex
description: On-demand ControlFlow workflow skills for non-trivial Codex tasks: spec capture, planning, plan review, orchestration, review, and memory hygiene.

interface.shortDescription: On-demand workflow skills for non-trivial Codex tasks
interface.longDescription: Bring the portable and practical parts of ControlFlow into Codex when extra discipline is worth the overhead: spec-before-plan capture, strict plan validation, tier-aware review artifacts, phased orchestration, context refresh, bounded retries, evidence-backed final review, semantic risk checks, and memory hygiene.
defaultPrompt: Use ControlFlow for Codex strict workflow for this repository task.
Capture a spec before planning this ambiguous repository change.
Run the full ControlFlow-Codex plan review chain on this saved plan.
Help me execute this approved plan with explicit gates and reviews.
